claims.title: AI/ML Engineer Intern
claims.details: Jan 2026 – Apr 2026 VishlRAFrosy.ai Remote Developed and evaluated ML models using Python and Scikit-learn for predictive analytics on real-world datasets. claims.title: React.js Frontend Intern
claims.details: Dec 2024 – Jan 2025 SoftCoding Solution Built responsive frontend interfaces and reusable UI components using React.js. Integrated REST APIs and optimized application performance and user experience.

claims.title: Physics-Informed IoT-Based Drone Detection System
claims.details: Python, YOLOv8, OpenCV, ESP32, Telegram API GitHub Repository: github.com/Rutu0912/DroneDetection Developed a real-time drone detection system using Deep Learning and Computer Vision achieving reliable distinction between drones and birds. Implemented physics-informed filtering (trajectory, speed, acceleration, stability) on top of YOLOv8 to reduce false positives significantly. Designed a complete AI + IoT pipeline integrating ESP32 and Telegram API for automated real-time alert generation. Evaluated system performance on 10+ real-world drone videos and custom datasets.

claims.title: AI-Assisted Legal Judgment Analysis System
claims.details: Python, NLP, Flask, TF-IDF, Cosine Similarity, Indian Kanoon API GitHub Repository: github.com/Rutu0912/AIJudicalReason Developed an AI-powered legal judgment analysis system for Company, Criminal, and Property Law domains using NLP techniques. Performed preprocessing and TF-IDF-based feature extraction on legal documents and used cosine similarity for relevant case retrieval. Integrated Indian Kanoon API to access legal judgments and precedent cases. Built a Flask web application for legal domain classification and structured judgment analysis.
